TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Katatipul, title = Katatipul, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Katatipul} }

S.FORM: == Katatipul == u sulit nu Hulam: Ść°ŚúįŚłÉťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Taitung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Katatipul. u kasalumaluma' nu Katatipul sa, 542 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 1,521 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 510 ku tademaw, pakalatu 34%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 1,011 ku tademaw, pakalatu 66%. u Puyuma a kamu sa, "Katatipul" sananay u baluden ku balucu' asaca papulung amin saan. natayni ku Minkoku sa, pabelihen u "Zhipen", kya kuizaway sa u "mateneng tu saayaway" sananay. u asip nu tademaw u kasabinacadan, Puyuma 25%, Pangcah(Amis) 4%, Tayan(Tayal) 1%, Paywan(Paiwan) 2%, zumazuma 2%. u niyzau' nu Puyuma u Puyuma a niyazu' kyuni, katuud ku Puyuma itini mueneng. u zuma a tademaw sa u Pangcah(Amis) u Tayan(Tayal) atu Paywan(Paiwan). u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini mueneng. caay kaw nu Sakizaya a niyazu' kuyni. haykay izawtu ku Sakizaya a tademaw, caay henay misumad ku ngangan nu cikdekay. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihca 01 a bulad u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). u Yincumin a kamu nu Sakizaya sananay, u ngiha' nu Hulam a kamu nu "ŚéüšĹŹśįĎ". u sakaizaay saan, u saayaway mueneng itiniay a tademaw sananay, itini uyiniyan a subal, tina subal a ngangan sa ku "Taywan", u Hulam a sulit sa ku ŚŹįÁĀ£. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 5 a bulad pulung sausi (561,916), Pangcah (209,668), Tayan (90,185), Paywan (100,775), Yuwatan (58,465), Rukay (13,319), Puyuma (14,170), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,630), Yami (4,612), Saw (790), Kabalan (1,470), Taluku (31,530), Sakizaya (940), Sejek (10,023), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (335), zuma (11,985)
S.PHON: == katatipur~…ĺ == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i taituŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu katatipur~…ĺ. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu katatipur~…ĺ sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *,*** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u pujuma a kamu sa, "katatipur~…ĺ" sananaj u bar~…ĺud…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° asa ¶a papur~…ĺuŇč amin saan. natajni ku minkoku sa, pab…ôr~…ĺińß…ôn u "zńßip…ôn", kja kuizawaj sa u "mat…ôn…ôŇč tu saajawaj" sananaj. u asip nu tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, pujuma **%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, pajwan(paiwan) *%, zumazuma *%. u nijzau Ē~ ° nu pujuma u pujuma a nijazu Ē~ ° kjuni, katuud ku pujuma itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) u tajan(tajar~…ĺ) atu pajwan(paiwan). u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. ¶aaj kaw nu sakizaja a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. ńßajkaj izawtu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ŇčaŇčan nu ¶ikd…ôkaj. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). u jin ¶umin a kamu nu sakizaja sananaj, u Ňčińßa Ē~ ° nu ńßur~…ĺam a kamu nu "***". u sakaizaaj saan, u saajawaj mu…ôn…ôŇč itiniaj a tad…ômaw sananaj, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ, tina subar~…ĺ a ŇčaŇčan sa ku "tajwan", u ńßur~…ĺam a sur~…ĺit sa ku **. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
S.FORM: == Katatipul == u sulit nu Hulam: Ść°ŚúįŚłÉťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Taitung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Katatipul. u kasalumaluma' nu Katatipul sa, 542 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 1,521 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 510 ku tademaw, pakalatu 34%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 1,011 ku tademaw, pakalatu 66%. u Puyuma a kamu sa, "Katatipul" sananay u baluden ku balucu' asaca papulung amin saan. natayni ku Minkoku sa, pabelihen u "Zhipen", kya kuizaway sa u "mateneng tu saayaway" sananay. u asip nu tademaw u kasabinacadan, Puyuma 25%, Pangcah(Amis) 4%, Tayan(Tayal) 1%, Paywan(Paiwan) 2%, zumazuma 2%. u niyzau' nu Puyuma u Puyuma a niyazu' kyuni, katuud ku Puyuma itini mueneng. u zuma a tademaw sa u Pangcah(Amis) u Tayan(Tayal) atu Paywan(Paiwan). u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini mueneng. caay kaw nu Sakizaya a niyazu' kuyni. haykay izawtu ku Sakizaya a tademaw, caay henay misumad ku ngangan nu cikdekay. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihca 01 a bulad u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). u Yincumin a kamu nu Sakizaya sananay, u ngiha' nu Hulam a kamu nu "ŚéüšĹŹśįĎ". u sakaizaay saan, u saayaway mueneng itiniay a tademaw sananay, itini uyiniyan a subal, tina subal a ngangan sa ku "Taywan", u Hulam a sulit sa ku ŚŹįÁĀ£. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 3 a bulad pulung sausi (560,820), Pangcah (209,203), Tayan (89,958), Paywan (100,591), Yuwatan (58,336), Rukay (13,303), Puyuma (14,118), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,601), Yami (4,599), Saw (780), Kabalan (1,466), Taluku (31,446), Sakizaya (930), Sejek (9,975), Laaluwa (398), Kanakanabu (330), zuma (12,320) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 5 a bulad pulung sausi (561,916), Pangcah (209,668), Tayan (90,185), Paywan (100,775), Yuwatan (58,465), Rukay (13,319), Puyuma (14,170), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,630), Yami (4,612), Saw (790), Kabalan (1,470), Taluku (31,530), Sakizaya (940), Sejek (10,023), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (335), zuma (11,985)

r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *,*** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *,*** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u pujuma a kamu sa, "katatipur~…ĺ" sananaj u bar~…ĺud…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° asa ¶a papur~…ĺuŇč amin saan. natajni ku minkoku sa, pab…ôr~…ĺińß…ôn u "zńßip…ôn", kja kuizawaj sa u "mat…ôn…ôŇč tu saajawaj" sananaj. u asip nu tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, pujuma **%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, pajwan(paiwan) *%, zumazuma *%. u nijzau Ē~ ° nu pujuma u pujuma a nijazu Ē~ ° kjuni, katuud ku pujuma itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u paŇč ¶ańß(amis) u tajan(tajar~…ĺ) atu pajwan(paiwan). u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. ¶aaj kaw nu sakizaja a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni. ńßajkaj izawtu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj misumad ku ŇčaŇčan nu ¶ikd…ôkaj. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). u jin ¶umin a kamu nu sakizaja sananaj, u Ňčińßa Ē~ ° nu ńßur~…ĺam a kamu nu "***". u sakaizaaj saan, u saajawaj mu…ôn…ôŇč itiniaj a tad…ômaw sananaj, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ, tina subar~…ĺ a ŇčaŇčan sa ku "tajwan", u ńßur~…ĺam a sur~…ĺit sa ku **. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
